note: Manual overrides for detect_student_page_ranges() when a page's text layer contains more than one known pseudonym and the built-in ghost-name rule (drop 'Karl', see ocr_pipeline.GHOST_PLACEHOLDER_NAME) cannot resolve it. Page numbers are 1-based. Each entry was confirmed by opening the rendered page image (ocr_output/_images/<pdf_stem>/) and reading the visible name banner directly, since the underlying text layer can contain a stale, covered-over label alongside the current one.

low_confidence_notes.Worksheets1-10.pdf/133: No visible name box at all (unlike 131/132/134-137), but the stale text-layer match was 'Frank', not a real re-boundary. Sits between two confirmed Eddy pages on both sides, so treated as an Eddy continuation page. Lower confidence than the other entries here — re-check if Frank's WS4 content looks incomplete.
